hero.title: Electronics curated for premium everyday performance.
hero.subtitle: Flagship phones, productivity laptops, dependable printers, and refined accessories with quotation-first checkout.
footer.copy: Premium electronics, responsive service, and transparent custom quotations.
home.toast.subscribed: You are now on the insider list.
home.latest.title: Fresh additions to the catalog
home.latest.description: Newly added products from the live inventory feed.
home.wanted.title: Most wanted right now
home.wanted.description: Products customers are viewing, saving, and adding to cart most often.
home.recent.title: Pick up where you left off
home.recent.description: Products you checked recently are kept ready for a faster return visit.
home.trust.secure.label: Secure Payment
home.trust.warranty.label: Official Warranty
home.trust.delivery.label: Fast Delivery
home.trust.returns.label: Easy Returns
home.trust.returns.detail: No-hassle return process for defective items
newsletter.title: Get launch drops, flash deals, and quotation-friendly offers first.
newsletter.description: Join with one click to get launch drops, flash deals, and quotation-friendly offers from NJ Store.
newsletter.formDescription: Enter your email and we will send the good stuff first.
newsletter.footer: No spam. Just launch alerts, flash deals, and restock-friendly updates.
flashDeals.title: Limited time discounts
flashDeals.description: High-value tech essentials with genuine end dates, visible urgency, and the strongest markdowns in the catalog.
flashDeals.emptyDescription: Flash deals now support a real end date. Publish a timed offer from admin products to light up the countdown section.
featured.title: High-demand electronics
featured.description: A merchandised featured carousel that keeps moving until the shopper decides to pause and explore.
brands.title: Trusted electronics brands
brands.description: Swipe through the live brand lineup, or use the side arrows to move across the logo rail.
brands.empty: No active brands have been published yet.
cart.loading.title: Your Cart
cart.loading.description: Loading your saved products and pricing details.
cart.heading.title: Your Cart
cart.heading.description: Server checks totals again before your quotation is created.
cart.empty.title: Your cart is empty
cart.empty.description: Add products from the catalog to build your quotation. We will keep pricing and delivery windows updated as you shop.
cart.empty.highlightQuoteDescription: Add products now and confirm fulfilment details once the quotation is ready.
cart.empty.highlightPricingDescription: Shipping previews, coupon savings, and totals update as soon as items are added.
cart.empty.highlightWishlistDescription: Sign in to move products to your wishlist and revisit them anytime.
cart.recent.title: Pick up where you left off
cart.recent.description: Recently viewed products stay close by so you can refill the cart without starting over.
cart.upsell.description: Helpful add-ons matched to what is already in your cart.
cart.summary.title: Cart total
cart.summary.description: Pricing is validated again when the quotation is created.
cart.toast.addError: Unable to add this product right now.
cart.toast.signInForWishlist: Sign in to save products for later.
cart.toast.moveError: Unable to move this item right now.
cart.toast.quantityError: Unable to update this quantity right now.
cart.toast.removeError: Unable to remove this item right now.
checkout.loading.title: Checkout
checkout.empty.heading: Checkout
checkout.empty.description: Add something to your cart first, then we can build the quotation smoothly.
checkout.empty.title: Your checkout is ready when your cart is
checkout.empty.body: Once products are added, we’ll preload payment, shipping preview, and quotation details here without the blank-screen jump.
checkout.heading.title: Checkout
checkout.heading.description: Create the quotation now. Fulfilment and payment are chosen after the quote is ready, so there are no extra details to fill here.
checkout.hero.quotationFirstDescription: No payment is captured at this stage. You review the quote before it becomes an order.
checkout.hero.deliveryPreviewDescription: Delivery, pickup, and payment are selected on the quotation before final confirmation.
checkout.hero.pdfDescription: Your branded quotation stays valid for {{days}} days after creation.
checkout.toast.createError: Unable to create quotation right now.
checkout.toast.reviewDetails: Please review the checkout details and try again.
checkout.progress.cartReviewedDescriptio: Your products and pricing snapshot are ready to become a quotation.
checkout.progress.detailsDescription: Add an optional coupon or note. Fulfilment and payment come after the quotation is ready.
checkout.progress.quotationReadyDescript: A branded PDF is generated immediately and stays valid for {{days}} days.
checkout.fulfilment.heading: Fulfilment Preference
checkout.fulfilment.description: You can still change delivery or pickup when you open the quotation later.
checkout.fulfilment.laterDescription: Keep fulfilment open and decide after the quotation is created.
checkout.fulfilment.deliveryDescriptionR: Use a saved address to prefill delivery and shipping preview.
checkout.fulfilment.deliveryDescriptionM: Add a saved address before preselecting delivery.
checkout.fulfilment.pickupDescription: Mark the quotation as pickup-first and finalize the details later.
checkout.fulfilment.addAddressTitle: Add a saved address to preselect delivery
checkout.fulfilment.addAddressDescriptio: You can still create the quotation now and decide later, or add an address first for a delivery-ready quote.
checkout.payment.heading: Payment Method
checkout.payment.description: Choose how you want the confirmed order to be paid.
checkout.payment.bankTransferDescription: Pay after quotation confirmation and upload the receipt.
checkout.payment.cashOnDeliveryDescripti: Keep things simple and pay when the confirmed order arrives.
checkout.payment.cashSelectedDescription: Bank details are hidden because payment will be collected only after the quotation becomes an order.
checkout.next.heading: After the quotation
checkout.next.description: The next screen is where the quote becomes a final order.
checkout.next.title: What happens after you create the quotation?
checkout.next.stepOne: 1. We generate your quotation PDF and save it to your account.
checkout.next.stepTwo: 2. Choose delivery or pickup and your payment method after reviewing it.
checkout.next.stepThree: 3. Once you confirm, NJ Store recalculates the final total and starts the order workflow.
checkout.coupon.heading: Savings & Notes
checkout.coupon.description: Validate any coupon now and add special instructions for the quotation.
checkout.coupon.validateError: Unable to validate coupon right now.
checkout.coupon.freeShippingIncluded: Free shipping is included with this coupon.
checkout.coupon.helper: Validate your coupon before creating the quotation so your preview total includes the current discount.
checkout.coupon.resetCodeChanged: Coupon code changed. Validate it again to refresh your savings.
checkout.coupon.resetCartChanged: Cart pricing changed. Validate the coupon again to refresh your savings.
checkout.coupon.resetDeliveryChanged: Delivery preference changed. Validate the coupon again to refresh your savings.
checkout.loyalty.heading: Loyalty Points
checkout.loyalty.description: Redeem points now; they are deducted only when the quotation becomes an order.
checkout.loyalty.helper: You can use up to {{maxPoints}} points on this quotation. Current loyalty value: {{amount}}.
checkout.loyalty.noPoints: No loyalty points are available for this quotation yet.
checkout.notes.label: Order Notes
checkout.notes.placeholder: Special instructions, preferred delivery time, or anything else...
checkout.bank.heading: Bank Transfer Details
checkout.bank.description: Shown only when bank transfer is selected.
checkout.bank.unavailable: Bank transfer details are not available yet. We will confirm payment instructions with the quotation.
checkout.summary.heading: Quotation Summary
checkout.summary.itemsReadySuffix: These items will be bundled into the quotation PDF.
checkout.verification.title: Email verification can wait until confirmation
checkout.verification.descriptionPrefix: You can create and download this quotation now. We’ll ask you to verify
checkout.verification.descriptionSuffix: only when you confirm the quotation into an order.
checkout.timer.description: A branded PDF is generated immediately after you create the quotation.
checkout.deliveryPreview.title: Delivery preview
checkout.deliveryPreview.note: Delivery or pickup can still be changed on the quotation screen before final confirmation.
checkout.actions.helper: No fulfilment or payment details are needed until the quotation is ready.
product.seo.descriptionFallback: Discover product details on NJ Store.
product.notFound.title: Product not found
product.notFound.slugDescription: We could not determine which product to show right now.
product.notFound.missingDescription: This product may have moved, been removed, or is temporarily unavailable.
product.support.deliveryDescription: Dispatch tracking and fulfilment updates from the dashboard.
product.support.warrantyDescription: Protected checkout and transparent after-sales assistance.
product.reviews.title: Ratings & reviews
product.reviews.description: Verified order reviews help the next shopper decide faster.
product.reviews.emptyDescription: Be the first shopper to share what worked, what surprised you, and what to know before buying.
product.reviewForm.title: Share your experience
product.reviewForm.descriptionSignedIn: Short, practical feedback helps future buyers and gives the merch team better quality signals.
product.reviewForm.descriptionSignedOut: Sign in to share a review after your order is delivered.
product.reviewForm.commentPlaceholder: What stood out in daily use, setup, packaging, or performance?
product.questions.title: Questions shoppers already asked
product.questions.description: Answers from the NJ Store team help clarify compatibility, stock, delivery, and warranty details before checkout.
product.questions.emptyDescription: Ask the first question if you want product-specific guidance from the store team.
product.related.title: More products worth comparing
product.related.description: Nearby alternatives from the same brand or category that shoppers often browse together.
product.questionModal.title: Ask a Question
product.questionModal.descriptionSuffix: and the NJ Store team can answer it publicly for future shoppers too.
product.questionModal.name: Name
product.questionModal.question: Question
product.questionModal.placeholder: Ask about stock, compatibility, warranty, delivery, or anything else you need.

product.stockAlert.descriptionPrefix: Leave your details and we will email you when

product.zoom.description: Use the zoom controls to inspect the active product image in more detail.
